name: Disruptor
notes: Signal Ridge's Covert Works exclusive electronic-warfare troop, not a building. Non-combat (canTarget: []), like Engineer, and maxSquadSize 1 (never merges), like Engineer/Commander. Its aura suppresses enemy Defensive-category buildings' targeting within radius — must be escorted deep into enemy base range to matter, since it has no attack and modest HP of its own; killing the Disruptor immediately restores the suppressed defenses. No stealth of its own (unlike Ghost Tank) — relies on escort, not concealment, to survive the approach.
